info.title: Assets API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: The Assets API provides equipment and asset-management coverage, including location asset retrieval, asset creation and updates, asset-type updates, attachment to work orders and work requests, asset-location changes, asset work-order history, asset tags, validation flags, and meter-reading capture.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for Assets API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. The Assets section is the most asset-centric part of the ServiceChannel API. The reference shows support for retrieving assets by ID or by location, searching filtered asset sets, traversing location asset trees, working with components and replacement candidates, updating asset records and asset types, attaching assets to work orders or work requests, moving assets between locations, retrieving work-order history, and managing meter readings in single or bulk mode. That makes it a practical integration surface for aligning ServiceNow equipment records and ServiceChannel repair execution around the same physical asset base.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.
